lines.hearsay: There was a long silence at {place}, and then a pen moving.
lines.gossip: {A} wrote {B}'s name against the hinge work in the shop book at {place} — {A}'s own hand, in the ledger {A} lets nobody else touch — and has not mentioned it since, which in that shop is as near an apology as anyone is going to get.
lines.report: {A} credited the hinge work to {B} in the shop's account book at {place}, slot {slot}.
